hooks.command:
bash -c '
FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"
if [[ -z "$FILE" ]]; then exit 0; fi

# Only check TypeScript files
if [[ "$FILE" != *.ts && "$FILE" != *.tsx ]]; then exit 0; fi

ROOT="/Users/valentinchion/src/primitiv-discord-bot"
if [[ "$FILE" == "$ROOT/bot/"* ]]; then
  PKG="$ROOT/bot"
elif [[ "$FILE" == "$ROOT/dashboard/"* ]]; then
  PKG="$ROOT/dashboard"
else
  exit 0
fi

HAS_ERRORS=0

echo "[typecheck] $(basename $PKG)..."
TSC_OUT=$(cd "$PKG" && npm run typecheck 2>&1)
TSC_EXIT=$?
if [ $TSC_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "$TSC_OUT"
  echo "[typecheck] FAILED"
  HAS_ERRORS=1
else
  echo "[typecheck] OK"
fi

if [[ "$PKG" == "$ROOT/dashboard" ]]; then
  echo "[eslint] $(basename $FILE)..."
  ESLINT_OUT=$(cd "$PKG" && npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1)
  ESLINT_EXIT=$?
  if [ $ESLINT_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "$ESLINT_OUT"
    echo "[eslint] FAILED"
    HAS_ERRORS=1
  else
    echo "[eslint] OK"
  fi
fi

exit $HAS_ERRORS
'
